title: rubus hirtus var. lamyi
intro: Rubus hirtus var. lamyi, also known as Lamy's raspberry, is a variety of the raspberry plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. lamyi include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against cell damage, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to create various remedies for digestive issues, skin problems, and other health concerns.
